_comment: Canonical Assistant agent model. Fast-path agent for simple tasks — shares the full tool set with the Primary agent but uses a smaller, lower-latency model.
name: AssistantAgent

agent_mode.description: The current agent mode (operator_bound, operator_not_bound, etc.)

content.description: The primary text output of the AI.

tool_calls.description: Optional list of tool calls initiated by the Assistant agent.
